01 ESG Reporting
BRSR Modeling CDP Disclosure GRI Implementation SASB Alignment TCFD Integration
02 Carbon & Climate
Net Zero Strategy Carbon Footprinting CBAM Compliance LCA & Product Carbon Supply Chain Mapping
03 Ratings & Targets
SBTi Target Setting CRREEM Modeling EcoVadis Strategy MSCI & Sustainalytics Internal ESG Scoring

EC (Env. Clearance) CTE / CTO Liaison EIA (Env. Impact) CGWA (Groundwater) Site Suitability
05 Licenses & EPR
Plastic Waste EPR E-Waste EPR Battery Waste EPR Hazardous Waste Licensing Digital Traceability
06 Management Systems
ISO 14001:2015 ISO 45001:2018 ISO 50001:2018 Integrated Systems (IMS) Auditor Training
07 Water Testing
Potable & Drinking Water Effluent (ETP) Analysis Groundwater & Soil ETP/STP Performance Audit Heavy Metal Screening
08 Air Monitoring
Stack Emission Testing Ambient Air (AAQ) VOC & Indoor Air (IAQ) Noise & Vibration CEMS Calibration
01

ESG & Sustainability Reporting

Navigate the complex landscape of global disclosure with audit-ready accuracy. We transform raw environmental and social data into high-impact, framework-compliant ESG reports that satisfy investors and regulators alike.

Technical Consultation

What's Included

Standardized protocols for corporate ESG transparency.

SEBI MANDATORY · INDIA

BRSR Reporting

Business Responsibility & Sustainability Reporting is mandatory for India's top 1000 listed companies under SEBI. We manage the complete lifecycle from materiality to submission.

  • Materiality assessment & KPI mapping
  • Cross-functional data collection templates
  • BRSR Core preparation for top 150/1000
  • Board-level presentation & audit trail
  • Year-on-year improvement tracking
Learn More & Case Studies →
GLOBAL STANDARD · CLIMATE

CDP Disclosure

Driving corporate transparency on climate change and water security through the global disclosure system. We help improve your scoring and investor confidence.

  • Scope 1, 2 & 3 emissions tracking
  • Climate risk (TCFD) alignment benchmarking
  • Supply chain engagement modules
  • Investor-led disclosure support
  • Scoring improvement strategies
Learn More & Case Studies →
IMPACT REPORTING · UNIVERSAL

GRI Standards

The world's most widely used standards for sustainability reporting, focusing on economic, environmental, and social impacts for diverse stakeholders.

  • Universal, Sector & Topic standard mapping
  • Stakeholder inclusiveness assessment
  • Human rights & labor disclosure
  • Supply chain transparency
  • Double materiality alignment
Learn More & Case Studies →
FINANCIAL MATERIALITY · INDUSTRY

SASB / ISSB

Industry-specific standards that identify the subset of ESG issues most relevant to financial performance. Tailored for investor-grade reporting.

  • 77 Industry-specific Standards
  • Financial materiality focus
  • SICS™ classification alignment
  • Internal control for ESG data
  • Investor-facing disclosure strategy
Learn More & Case Studies →
RISK MANAGEMENT · CLIMATE

TCFD Alignment

Implementing recommendations for climate-related financial disclosures across governance, strategy, and risk management to build resilience.

  • Climate-related scenario analysis
  • Physical & transition risk assessment
  • Governance structure for climate
  • GHG target setting (Net Zero)
  • Metrics & targets validation
Learn More & Case Studies →

Why modern reporting is difficult

We address the core challenges of corporate disclosure.

01

Regulatory Complexity

BRSR, GRI, SASB, and TCFD all have different requirements. Keeping track of overlapping metrics is a significant administrative burden.

02

Data Fragmentation

Sustainability data often sits in siloed departments—HR, Operations, Finance, and Supply Chain—making it hard to create a unified narrative.

03

Audit Readiness

Investors now demand "assurance" on ESG data. Reports that lack a clear data-trail are increasingly rejected by institutional capital.

The SustainCore Protocol

A 4-step journey to world-class disclosure.

01

Assessment

  • Materiality Matrix
  • Stakeholder Interviews
  • Gap Analysis
02

Strategy

  • KPI Identification
  • Framework Selection
  • Benchmarking
03

Data Pipeline

  • Automated Collection
  • Quality Verification
  • Evidence Tracking
04

Disclosure

  • Design & Creative
  • Board Submission
  • Publication

What you receive

Our engagement ends with tangible, audit-ready assets for your board.

Technical Frameworks

Detailed alignment with global and national disclosure standards.

Regulatory Compliance
  • SEBI BRSR Mandatory for top 1000 listed entities
  • BRSR Core Reasonable assurance for 9 ESG attributes
  • CSR Reporting Section 135, Companies Act 2013
  • EU CSRD Applicable for Indian firms with EU revenue
Global Standards
  • GRI Standards Universal, Sector & Topic Standards
  • SASB / ISSB Industry-specific financial materiality
  • TCFD Climate-related financial risk & governance
  • SDG Mapping Alignment with UN 2030 Goals

Common Questions

Clarifying the complexities of ESG disclosure.

Currently, SEBI mandates BRSR for the top 1000 listed entities by market capitalization in India. However, many unlisted companies are adopting it voluntarily to satisfy supply chain requirements from global partners or to prepare for future IPOs and private equity due diligence.
Double materiality considers two dimensions: how sustainability issues affect your company's financial value (Financial Materiality) and how your company's activities impact people and the environment (Impact Materiality). Our protocol covers both to meet EU CSRD and GRI requirements.
A full, framework-aligned report typically takes 3 to 5 months. This includes stakeholder engagement, data collection across siloed departments, verification, narrative drafting, and design. Early preparation is key to ensuring audit-ready data.
SEBI now requires "Reasonable Assurance" for the BRSR Core attributes for the top 150 listed entities (from FY 2023-24), scaling to the top 1000 over the next few years. We design your data pipeline to be inherently auditable by any global tier-1 assurance provider.
GRI Certified SEBI Compliant SASB Aligned BRSR Specialist
